{{- /* Callout / admonition box. {{< callout type="warning" >}} Body text in **markdown**. {{< /callout >}} type: note (default) | info | tip | success | warning | danger aliases: warn->warning, caution/error->danger, important->info (may also be passed positionally: {{< callout warning >}}) title: overrides the auto title; pass title="" to hide it icon: overrides the auto icon (any name under assets/icons) */ -}} {{- $type := "note" -}} {{- if .IsNamedParams -}} {{- $type = .Get "type" | default "note" -}} {{- else -}} {{- $type = .Get 0 | default "note" -}} {{- end -}} {{- $type = lower $type -}} {{- $type = index (dict "warn" "warning" "caution" "danger" "error" "danger" "important" "info") $type | default $type -}} {{- if not (in (slice "note" "info" "tip" "success" "warning" "danger") $type) }}{{ $type = "note" }}{{ end -}} {{- $icon := .Get "icon" | default (index (dict "note" "pencil" "info" "info" "tip" "lightbulb" "success" "check-circle" "warning" "alert-triangle" "danger" "alert-octagon") $type) -}} {{- $title := index (dict "note" (i18n "callout_note") "info" (i18n "callout_info") "tip" (i18n "callout_tip") "success" (i18n "callout_success") "warning" (i18n "callout_warning") "danger" (i18n "callout_danger")) $type -}} {{- /* isset needs a map, so only consult named params (positional .Params is a slice). */ -}} {{- if .IsNamedParams }}{{ if isset .Params "title" }}{{ $title = .Get "title" }}{{ end }}{{ end -}}
{{ partial "icon.html" $icon }}
{{- with $title }}

{{ . }}

{{ end -}} {{ .Page.RenderString (dict "display" "block") .InnerDeindent }}
